---
title: "installization"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# installization

>Do not use the preview function in this installization file. copy to the terminal in this dir.

## RandomMeas

```{julia}
using Pkg
Pkg.activate(".")
Pkg.add("LanguageServer") # which provides the language server for julia, and it is the dependency of the vscode extension of julia.
Pkg.add("RandomMeas")
Pkg.add("ITensors")
```
